message:
feat(fleet_launcher): add queryable launch metadata surface and serde support (ft-3681t.3.1.1)

Make LaunchPlan, LaunchSlot, LaunchPhase, LaunchOutcome, SlotOutcome, and
FleetLaunchError serializable for storage, transmission, and audit trails.

Add query surface types and methods:
- ProgramDistribution: per-program slot allocation summary
- MetadataProjectionFailure: reason codes for metadata projection errors
- RegistrySummary: high-level entity counts from launch outcome
- LaunchPlan: programs(), program_distribution(), slots_in_phase(),
  slot(), phase_labels(), invariant_violations()
- LaunchOutcome: registry_summary(), successful_outcomes(),
  failed_outcomes(), skipped_outcomes(), is_complete()

18 new unit tests covering serde roundtrips, distribution correctness,
invariant validation, query methods, and reason code Display formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
